--- Round 2 ---
<think>I found the inventory (存货) value in the balance sheet. Let me extract the relevant information:

From the balance sheet:
- 存货 | 539,799,391.08 | 560,513,223.67

The current period (期末余额) inventory value is 539,799,391.08 yuan, which is approximately 539.8 million yuan.

The question asks for companies where inventory is above 1,000,000,000 yuan (1 billion yuan).

539,799,391.08 yuan < 1,000,000,000 yuan

So this company (金通灵科技集团股份有限公司) does NOT have inventory above 1 billion yuan.

I have found the evidence I need from this document. The inventory value is clearly stated as 539,799,391.08 yuan, which is below the 1 billion threshold.

I should now stop and provide the evidence.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the inventory value in the balance sheet"}</search>
<answer>["存货|539,799,391.08|560,513,223.67"]</answer>
